summary: Iteration 40 frontend testing completed successfully. Verified the new 'Embedded High-Detail Reports From Your History' feature on ReportView page. All required elements are present and functioning: section heading, report type badges, generated dates, embedded analysis content, and 'Open Original' buttons. Current report rendering has no regressions - all 7 core components passed.
critical_code_review_comments: ReportView.jsx: Embedded legacy reports section properly implemented with data-testid='embedded-legacy-reports-section'
API call to /api/reports/embedded-legacy correctly fetches and displays historical reports with analysis > 1200 chars
Each embedded report shows: title (h4), report type badge, generated date, Open Original button, and analysis content
Correct conditional rendering - section only shows when legacyReports.length > 0
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test user embedcheck_1772801403@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified the new embedded legacy reports feature on ReportView page. Test credentials: embedcheck_1772801403@example.com / Test1234!. Test route: /cases/case_01a9fa3daa63/reports/rpt_91d0adab572a. The embedded section appears at the bottom of the report page when the user has historical reports with analysis content > 1200 characters. Key findings: 1) Login requires pressing Enter after filling credentials (modal overlay blocks button click); 2) Terms acceptance page must be handled after login; 3) Embedded Legacy Reports section shows with correct heading 'Embedded High-Detail Reports From Your History'; 4) Each embedded report card has: title, type badge (Quick Summary/Full Detailed/Extensive Log), generated date, Open Original button, and scrollable analysis content.

login_flow.details: Successfully logged in with test credentials using Enter key

terms_acceptance.details: Terms page handled correctly, navigated to dashboard
